security.title: Security
security.description: Configure two-factor authentication and manage DAV app passwords.
security.2faMandated: Two-factor enrollment is required by administrators.
security.2faDeadlineExpired: Your grace period has ended. Complete two-factor setup to continue accessing all app features.
security.2faSetupStep1: 1. Scan this QR code in Google Authenticator, 1Password, or acompatible authenticator app.
security.2faSetupStep2: 2. If needed, enter this key manually:
security.2faCode: Authenticator or backup code for sensitive actions
security.shownOnceDescription: Each backup code can be used once. You will not be able to view these exact codes again.
security.copyFailed: Copy failed. Use Select All, then copy manually.
security.appPasswordsDescription: Use these one-time generated passwords for CalDAV/CardDAV clients that cannot complete interactive two-factor sign-in.

api.passwordSuccess: Password updated. Use your new password for app login and DAV clients.
api.2faSetupSuccess: Setup initialized. Scan the QR code and enter a verification code.
api.2faDisableSuccess: Two-factor authentication has been disabled and DAV app passwords were revoked.
